examples.title: Speed from Distance-Time Graph
examples.content: In 10 seconds you go 100 meters. Slope = 100/10 = 10 m/s. That's your speed!

examples.title: Acceleration from Velocity Graph
examples.content: Velocity increases from 0 to 20 m/s in 5 seconds. Slope = 20/5 = 4 m/s². That's acceleration!

examples.title: Cost per Item
examples.content: Total cost vs quantity: 10 items cost $30, 20 items cost $60. Slope = 30/10 = $3 per item.
